title: R2: Add unit test for U+FEFF stripping
description: canonicalize_display_name includes U+FEFF (ZERO WIDTH NO-BREAK SPACE / BOM) in ZWS_CHARS with explicit security comment: 'it is invisible and can appear in copy-pasted text, creating two names that look identical but differ.' However, there is no unit test verifying U+FEFF is actually stripped. Tests exist for U+200B, U+200C, U+2060 but not U+FEFF itself. Per project Test Integrity rules (CLAUDE.md), implementation without explicit test oracle is incomplete. Add: #[test] fn bom_stripped() { assert_eq\!(canonicalize_display_name("a\u{FEFF}b"), Ok("ab".to_string())); }
close_reason: Already implemented: DESIGN.md §3 documents U+FEFF and bom_stripped_silently test exists in ws.rs
